zh.lifeSummary: Isabella Kirkpatrick於1275年出生在蘇格蘭金加迪爾。她於大約1277年與William De Graham在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1337年之後在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安克萊頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isabella Kirkpatrick于1275年出生在苏格兰金加迪爾。她于大约1277年与William De Graham在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1337年之后在苏格兰米德洛迪安克萊頓。

nameMeanings.name: Kirkpatrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from either of two places in Dumfriess called Kirkpatrick or any of various other places in Scotland, all so named from the dedication of their church to Saint Patrick. The Scottish word kirk sometimes replaced Gaelic cill ‘church’ in placenames; compare Kilpatrick .

variants.name: Kilpatrick
meanings: Irish (Ulster): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Phádraig ‘son of the servant of (Saint) Patrick’ (Irish Pádraig). See also Fitzpatrick .
Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called in Gaelic as cill Padraig ‘church of (Saint) Patrick’. See also Kirkpatrick .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: Isabella Kirkpatrick was born in 1275, in Kincardineshire, Scotland. She married William De Graham about 1277, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died after 1337, in Crichton, Midlothian, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabella Kirkpatrick est née en 1275, à Kincardineshire, Écosse. Elle a épousé William De Graham environ 1277, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée après 1337, à Crichton, Midlothian, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Isabella Kirkpatrick wurde 1275 in Kincardineshire, Scotland geboren. Sie hat um 1277 in Scotland William De Graham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb nach 1337 in Crichton, Midlothian, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Isabella Kirkpatrick è nata il nel 1275 nel Kincardineshire, Scotland. Lei sposato William De Graham circa 1277, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì dopo il 1337, nel Crichton, Midlothian, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Kirkpatrickは1275年にスコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアで生まれた。約1277年にスコットランドでWilliam De Grahamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1337年以後にスコットランドミドロスアンクリチトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Kirkpatrick(은)는 1275년 스컷랜드 킨카딘실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1277년 스컷랜드에서 William De Graham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1337년 이후 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 크리튼에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Isabella Kirkpatrick nasceu em 1275, em Kincardineshire, Scotland. Ela casou-se com William De Graham aproximadamente 1277, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu após 1337, em Crichton, Midlothian, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabella Kirkpatrick родилась в 1275 г. в местности кинкардаинешир, Шотландия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William De Graham около 1277 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла после 1337 г. в местности кричтон, мидлотян, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Isabella Kirkpatrick nació en 1275, en Kincardineshire, Scotland. Se casó con William De Graham aproximadamente 1277, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió después de 1337, en Crichton, Midlothian, Scotland.
